title: notifications-mail — retention windows
description: MailSuppression retention is regulation-driven — hard bounces forever, complaints P5Y for CAN-SPAM evidence.
compliance_regimes_referenced: can_spam §7704(a)(4) — unsubscribe records retained 10 days functional; complaint records retained for evidence
gdpr Art. 30 (records of processing — who unsubscribed when)

hot.description: Hard bounces retained forever. Address is invalid; suppression is protection.
Follows the user account lifecycle. Preference layer is the authoritative unsubscribe record; this is a provider-level filter.

purge.action: hard delete via cascade + write audit row

hot.description: Tenant-managed. Deletable by tenant admin at any time.

purge.action: soft delete then hard delete after 30d

hot.description: Known spam-trap domains — platform-wide protection. is_system=true.
